comment: Tag poses expressed in the Leksell frame coordinate system. Axes: x=0 right → x=200mm left; y=0 posterior → y=200mm anterior; z=0 superior/out-of-tags (toward camera) → z=200mm at tag plane. Tag positions are fixed physical measurements — each tag independently establishes the full coordinate frame. ry=pi aligns the tag's local axes with the Leksell axes (ArUco z points toward camera = Leksell −z; ArUco x points right = Leksell −x, both flipped by Ry(pi)).
